programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: A 1917 Overland will be FantomWorks oldest restoration, if they can solve this jigsaw puzzle of rotted wood and rusted steel. Dan buys a 1968 Camaro on the internet for his wife, Malissa, and finds out that the car is in extremely poor condition.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: At FantomWorks, there are 85 cars being worked on and multiple owners who expect miracles. From a vintage motorcycle to getting a 1970 GTO ready for a returning vet, Dan burns the midnight oil to get cars out the door so new arrivals can take their place.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Mike thought his 1967 Chevy K10 Pick Up needed paint improvement. Dan quickly realizes that the car needs much more. Nobody restores 1970 Opel Kadett, so there are no parts anywhere for Harry’s car that needs a lot of everything.

programme.title: Muscle Cars of Texas
programme.desc: The 1966 Mustang that was purchased at Mechum Auctions a year ago needs a tune up. The team is in the paint booth working on another 1966 mustang.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: When the 1941 Buick Coupe rolls into FantomWorks, it is the worst possible combination: a very difficult car and very demanding owner. Janelle wants her KZ-750 transformed into a cool stripped down ‘café’ bike – a challenge for FantomWorks new bike shop.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Steve wants to run his 1954 Oldsmobile in a thousand-mile road race. Dan faces a tight budget, a tough schedule and race rules. Jim wants Fantomworks to bring his 1977 Spitfire out of a coma; but Dan puts his foot down when safety issues are discovered.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: The owner of a C10 pick-up wants a full frame off restoration and as Dan predicted, things get ugly when they peel off the paint. A Heinkel came in with mismatched scooter parts hiding an incredibly rare car - which makes parts almost impossible to find.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: A 1977 Corvette Stingray arrives with seven layers of paint and too many problems to count. The restoration makes no sense, but Dan takes it. A 1965 Cobra is brought in for a simple wiring job. Then, the owner decides to wrap the car like a fighter jet.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: Judgement Day
programme.desc: The world is littered with the remains of forgotten muscle cars. At Graveyard Carz, some will get a second chance in the hands of Mark Worman and the Ghouls.

programme.title: The Ride Life
programme.desc: Sung returns to his home town LA, the car culture capital of the world. This is where Sung feels the most pressure to be on his game. But in the car scene, Sung meets old friends, discovers new inspirations, and finds a way to face life's challenges.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Dan and the team take on the restorations of a 1965 Cadillac Deville and a 1984 Monte Carlo. The 'caddie' is so full of leaves and rat droppings that it's a health hazard. The Monte Carlo is intended as an anniversary present.

programme.title: Muscle Cars of Texas
programme.desc: This time, on Muscle Cars of Texas, Vinnie and the team are working on a 63 Z06, 59 Ford Pickup and a 69 Chevy Malibu.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: Cuda 'Tat
programme.desc: The world is littered with the remains of forgotten muscle cars. At Graveyard Carz, some will get a second chance in the hands of Mark Worman and the Ghouls.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Tom asks Dan to find him a rare 1967 Camaro Convertible with factory AC. But when Dan finds the Unicorn, the car is too good to cut up. Dave wants Dan to build a safe, all stock 1971 Datsun, but the car has been badly damaged by previous restoration work.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: FantomWorks epic 4 year long wrestling match with the 1961 International Harvester Metro concludes with an incredible, one-of-a-kind van. Ray wants his 1969 ZL1 to match the number 68 rally car, but he needs Dan’s rare Winters stamped 427 COPO motor.

programme.title: Muscle Cars of Texas
programme.desc: Vinnie is working on replacing the gages on this 1975 Corvette. The rocker panels on the 1964 Corvette are ready to be reinstalled.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Dan's team take on the restorations of a 1966 Volkswagen Beetle and a 1976 TR6 convertible. The TR6 looks bad, but Dan sees hidden potential for it to become a rare 'survivor' car that still has its original paint and fixtures.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Daniel wants FantomWorks to swap out the V6 of his 1968 Mustang Convertible with the V8 from a donor car. Stacia and Eugenia need Dan’s help to transform their quirky 1962 Citroen 2CV from a ‘problem child’ to a reliable car.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Nikkos wants a spectacular 1968 Mustang Fastback resto-mod. The all-metal masterpiece catches the eye of someone who wants it at any cost. Jim and Arlene want to enjoy their 45th anniversary in the same 1969 Firebird they rode in on their wedding day.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Mike wants Dan to make his prized Mach 1 even more of a muscle car. Richard brings FantomWorks the first ‘his and hers’ restoration – a Sunbeam Tiger and a Fiat Spider – but as Dan soon discovers; the challenges of the two cars are not equal.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: When Gray brings his 1929 Phaeton in, Dan uncovers deadly dangers that lead to lifesaving repairs. Tony believes his 1989 Jeep Wrangler is 95% done, but the car is a rolling disaster of bad work, tangled wires and incompatible parts.

programme.title: Snooker
programme.desc: Live coverage from a top-level snooker event on the International circuit.

programme.title: World Seniors Snooker 900
programme.desc: Featuring coverage of the World Seniors Snooker 900 tournament.

programme.title: World Seniors Snooker 900
programme.desc: Featuring coverage of the World Seniors Snooker 900 tournament.

programme.title: World Seniors Snooker 900
programme.desc: Snooker legends compete in a one-day spectacular at Goffs venue in County Kildare. It's Semi-Final time! Ken Doherty Vs Fergal O'Brien and Jimmy White Vs Stephen Hendry.

programme.title: World Seniors Snooker 900
programme.desc: Featuring coverage of the World Seniors Snooker 900 tournament.

programme.title: Snooker 900
programme.desc: Snooker 900 is the new fast, 15-minute version of snooker. It features legends like Jimmy White and showcases top amateurs, juniors, women, and disabled players.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: The patriarch of a ranch family feels he's too old to rein in some wild horses.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A cop is working undercover at a school to put an end to drug use but faces suspension because of a mistake Mark has made.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: At Christmastime, Jonathan and Mark try to get a divorced couple to work together for their son's sake. Meanwhile, the holiday may be in jeopardy when a department store Santa is arrested.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Four brothers go on the run to escape a court order that would split them up.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A country doctor refuses to slow down and seems to be working himself to death.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A district attorney clashes with a lawyer who agrees to defend a friend charged with stealing.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Mark returns to Oakland to become a police officer again and is reunited with his old partner. However, he discovers his old beat has become a storm of racial hatred.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A veterans' support group becomes a lifeline for Commander Michaels, who continues to deal with post-traumatic stress disorder. Meanwhile, she discovers that her son David came into the emergency room due to an accident.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A pastor must follow a church council's decision to fire most of the staff at the school because they're not Christian.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Mark attends his high school class reunion and learns that some memories are bittersweet for his old friends.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A teenage girl tells school reporters that a driver came on to her right before the bus got into an accident. She may not be telling the truth. Jonathan tries to teach the news writers the correct way to report a story.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: The problems of the handicapped are addressed when an amputee joins a crusade after a false fire alarm.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Mr. Zelinka is a beloved teacher who is being forced to retire because he's old. Jonathan and Mark know that he would prefer to continue teaching.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: The parents of two Vietnamese children come to America to look for them after a ten-year separation.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: After having been scarred in a fire, an actress becomes a counselor at a summer camp for blind children. The camp is run by Jonathan and Mark's blind friend Frank.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A young man decides to institutionalize his brother who has been completely paralyzed and speechless for many years, against the wishes of their mother.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Mark believes that God has turned Jonathan into a dog. Meanwhile, he must contend with a runaway kid and the kid's scatterbrained mother.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve, Jonathan shows three men what will happen in the future if the Earth continues to be ravaged by pollution. One of the men is an energy official another is a farmer and the third one is the President.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Charlie Bates' dream about a hold-up becomes a reality — and he becomes the suspect.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: A jack-of-all-trades man stumbles across a way to improve the water wheel.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Johnny Ringo recounts his rise as a gunslinger.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: A greedy merchant creates panic by spreading rumors that the town's supply lines are cut off by snow.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: The Truth About Old Man Clanton
programme.desc: Wyatt Earp heads south to make peace when he learns that Old Man Clanton has sent his men into Mexico to rob the silver trains and steal the cattle of wealthy Mexican rancher Don Sebastian.
programme.sub-title: The Truth About Old Man Clanton

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: Doc Fabrique's Greatest Case
programme.desc: Shotgun's mule Roscoe is sick and he wants Dr. McCarty to help. When he says the mule is drunk, Earp decides to call Doc Fabrique from Wichita to help.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: A wounded Matt Dillon loses his memory and falls in love with an attractive widow.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: Caught by a Whisker
programme.desc: Two brothers decide to rob the Dodge City State National Bank. However, a new alarm bell in the bank and a wise Earp expecting them pose problems for the men getting away.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Stagecoach driver Abe Williamson hunts down two outlaws who robbed his stagecoach.
programme.sub-title: The Treasure of Elk Creek Canyon

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: A princess agrees to be treated by a medical pioneer who uses a new method: blood transfusion.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: A dramatization of the life of hat manufacturer John Stetson.
programme.sub-title: The Hat That Wore the West

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: A female journalist reports on a corrupt politician.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: Miss Sadie
programme.desc: The wife of a wounded outlaw takes him to Tombstone for medical attention as he has decided to go straight. Earp learns who he is but doesn't trust him.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: A Civil War veteran tries to rid his hometown of terrorists.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: Behan Shows His Hand
programme.desc: Clum and others want Earp to take a posse after the men he was forced to release threaten him, but Earp declines.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: In Totem, Idaho, Dorsey Bilger has told one tall tale too many.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Newlyweds strike it rich with the discovery of borax.
programme.sub-title: Green Is the Color of Gold

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: An itinerant medicine man and his daughter find only tragedy when they attempt to sell their wares in Dodge City.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: When five men desert the Union Army, they are at the mercy of General Avery, who favors shooting them.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Steve Forrest guest stars as a gunfighter whose speed is legendary but who now is trying to live a quiet, nonviolent life with Teresa, the girl he loves.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: Hiding Behind a Star
programme.desc: Earp needs new deputies so Doc Holliday recommends his former brother-in-law for the job even though his sister-in-law hates Doc.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Judge Roy Bean names his town after a British actress who he loves but has never met.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: Wyatt Earp Rides Shotgun
programme.desc: Earp is asked by Wells Fargo to ride shotgun to help catch the Purvis gang. Earp agrees but a grandmother complicates the situation when she refuses to wait for a later stage.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: Hang 'Em High
programme.desc: Bat is forced to hang Dal who he believes is innocent. Dal has been framed by the White Cap vigilantes and Earp wants to stop them.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: A lawyer (Ronald Reagan) sues a man who killed a boy's dog.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: Nineteen Notches on His Gun
programme.desc: The Dutch Henry gang is rustling cattle and killing ranch hands on some of the smaller ranches around town. Sheriff Bassett is sick so Earp and Bat decide to go undercover into the gang.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: Let's Hang Curly Bill
programme.desc: Marshal Fred White tries to take the pistol from a drunk Curly Bill Brocius but White's actions cause the gun to fire and he is mortally wounded.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: With Matt out of town, Doc only has Chester to protect him when his life is threatened.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: So Long, Dora, So Long
programme.desc: As Jim Kelly and Dora Hand prepare to wed, Jim Rellance from Texas hopes to marry Dora. Dora tells him to find a younger girl and Earp tells him to leave Dodge City.

programme.title: Harlequin: The Waiting Game
programme.desc: Sarah og Amy er bestevenner for livet og nå arrangerer de sin første kunstutstilling i en liten by i New England. Når en mystisk fremmed dukker opp, starter et mysterium med narkotika, CIA og Sarahs elskede onkel. NB Denne filmen vises uten norsketekster.

programme.title: Harlequin: Loving Evangeline
programme.desc: Robert får vite om sin brors dødelige båtulykke som får han til å dra for å hente liket. Der møter han Evie Shaw som er eieren av marinaen. Han blir besatt av sin brors mistenkelige død... og av Evie. NB Denne filmen vises uten norsketekster.

programme.title: Harlequin: Recipe for Revenge
programme.desc: Caterer Carly Westin agrees to prepare a feast for a friend who wants to impress a man. But the couple is killed when she is in the kitchen. When police investigator Jack Brannigan gets involved, he must protect Carly before the killer strikes again.

programme.title: Harlequin: A Change of Place
programme.desc: When troubled twin Dominique asks her bookish sister Kimberly to assume her role for a month as a glamorous Parisian model, Kimberly hesitates.

programme.title: Harlequin: Another Woman
programme.desc: Da Lisa våkner på sykehuset, husker hun ingenting:at mannen hennes Paul vil skille seg fra henne, eller at hun ble brutalt slått og etterlatt for å dø. Når Paul tar henne med hjem, må Lisa lære alt på nytt. NB Denne filmen vises uten norske undertekster.

programme.title: Harlequin: Treacherous Beauties
programme.desc: Anne mistenker at broren Alans død ikke var en ulykke. Hun begynner å jobbe for en familie som kan ha hatt en finger med i spillet, men blir snart forelsket i den eldste sønn. NB Denne filmen vises uten norske undertekster.

programme.title: Harlequin: Broken Lullaby
programme.desc: En foreldreløs jentes (Mel Harris) jakt etter fortiden begynner med et barndomsbilde av henne selv ved siden av en sjelden spilledåse, og fører henne til en lokkende skattejeger. NB Denne filmen vises uten norske undertekster.

programme.title: Harlequin: At the Midnight Hour
programme.desc: En vakker barnepike(Liz) fanger oppmerksomheten Richard, en enkemann og vitenskapsmann, og hans begavede sønn Andy. Liz' liv blir truet når hun kommer for nær sannheten om hvem som drepte den tidligere hans frue. NB Denne filmen vises uten norsketekster.

programme.title: Harlequin: The Awakening
programme.desc: When a bounty hunter who's tracking one of her tenants convinces Sara McAllister to team up with him, they start an adventure into the dangerous world of international espionage and love.

programme.title: Harlequin: This Matter of Marriage
programme.desc: Arkitektene Hallie og Donnalee arbeider med et stort byggeprosjekt for en eksentrisk milliardær, Adam Barr. Hallieshar lett etter drømmemannen, finner ham plutselig rett ved siden av. NB Denne filmen vises uten norsketekster.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Rocsi Diaz XXVIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' oppdager Rob, Steelo og Rocsi Diaz farene ved å bli oppmuntret i 'Dette fikser du ikke', sjekker noen teknologifiender i 'Robothatere' før de møter noen arge englendere i 'Britisk raseri'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Rocsi Diaz XXIX
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' skyter Rob, Steelo og Rocsi Diaz rett i kurven med stil med 'Ballfintere', oppdager at enkelte dager er 'Umiddelbart dårlige dager' og blir vitner til søt justis på veien i 'Veikarma'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Rocsi Diaz XXX
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' er Rob, Steelo og gjestende vert Rocsi Diaz veldig oppmerksomme men gjør likevel 'Forsiktige feil', mister taket på 'Overdimensjonert last' og drar sin vei med stil i 'Smidige avskjeder'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Rocsi Diaz XXXI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' flipper Rob, Steelo og Rocsi Diaz ut i 'Halvt baklengs', setter seg på 'Billige stoler' og ser hvem som får seg en 'Dekksmekk'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Rocsi Diaz XXXII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' tilbringer Rob, Steelo og Rocsi Diaz en smertefull dag på vannet i 'Båtknekt', går ut og blir 'Terrassevrak' og manifesterer en del smeller i 'Dårlig tiltrekning'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Rocsi Diaz XXXIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' passer Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Rocsi Diaz godt på bakdelene sine, så de ikke blir 'Rumpestukket', tar rare omveier for å unngå 'Ville veisperringer' og går tilbake til Robs røtter med 'Skaterhatere'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Daymond John II
programme.desc: I kveldens episode av 'Ridiculousness' møter Rob, Steelo, Lolo Wood og gjest Daymond John nifse haier i 'Finneskrekk', vil ikke investere i folk som er 'Ikke banebrytende' og finner ut hva som skjer når man tar 'Slurvete snarveier'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Daymond John III
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim, Lolo Wood og gjest Daymond John pengerådgivning av 'Mini-Daymonds', møter noen rasende bier som skaper 'Biebataljer' og tester produkter i 'Prøv før du kjøper'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XLI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' blir Rob, Steelo og gjestevert Lolo Wood rådløse på sjøen og blir helt 'Havkorka', kaster for mange erteposer i 'Villvest-Cornhole' og må jobbe med egen tålmodighet fordi de 'Avskyr å vente'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Rocsi Diaz XXXIV
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' klatrer Rob, Steelo og Rocsi Diaz i feil trær med 'Døde greiner', klatrer opp på feil person i 'Dårlige skulderholdere' og blir intense på kontoret med 'Ekstrem kontorstoling'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Paige Desorbo
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob, Steelo og Paige Desorbo se noen ryggradpirrende fall i 'Ryggknekkere', hører hvordan Rob sparte penger for å flytte til California i 'Lagerleker' og avslutter med smerte ved vannet i 'Tørr landing'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Paige Desorbo II
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' vil Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Paige DeSorbo unngå å få nesen ut av ledd i 'Neseborsjokk', unngår små, gira råtasser i 'Helvete på plasthjul' og kliner til med noen frampå eldre damer i 'Sugne bestemødre'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XLII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' tar Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood sparkesykkel-kollisjoner til et høyere nivå med 'Sparkesykkelspark', konfronterer søppeldagen direkte med 'Vanskelig søppel' og snur uhell til hell i 'Utilsiktede seiere'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XLIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' slår Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood ut håret med 'Partyrotter', ler av noen ordentlige 'Krimklovner' og tar en titt på ulike 'Krasjkamera'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood X
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' prøver Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood å bære alt i én omgang i 'For mye å bære', slår seg løs på do med 'Båskriminalitet' og er ekstremt galante som i 'De beste kjærestene'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Madison Pettis
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' oppdager Rob, Steelo og Madison Pettis farene ved stiger i 'Stigekræsj', føler at de må følge fulle venner hjem i 'Fylleleveranser' og oppdager at ikke alle maskoter er like i 'Maskotproblemer'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XLV
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' opplever Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood verdens verste smerter i 'Halebeinbrutalitet', opplever at allergisesongen er ille i 'Naturlig snørrete' og drar langt ut på landet og fester i 'Partylåver'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Madison Pettis II
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' går Rob, Steelo og Madison Pettis mellom snøbrettkjørere og skiløpere i 'Snøkrig', slåss mot sulten på verste måte i 'Nattmatkatastrofe' og sykler på feil trær i 'Sykkel møter bark'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Lexi Rivera
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' kaster Rob, Steelo og Lexi Rivera seg inn i spillet med noen 'Nattatleter', tar en slumsete drink laget av noen 'Sleivete miksologer' og feirer irriterende forhold i 'Elsker å hate dem'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Lexi Rivera II
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' benytter Rob, Steelo og gjestevert Lexi Rivera de bevegelige trappene i 'Opptrappet smerte', møter morderiske barn som muligens er 'Foreldrekverkere' og kan ikke krysse gaten uten å oppleve 'Overgangskræsj'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XLVI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' fyrer Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood av noen 'Skliskudd', starter hårete branner 'I fyr og flamme' og krangler om rot i 'Snuskete kjærlighet'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XLVII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood tak i en partner og nyter 'Parskøyting', gjør seg klar til en underholdende kveld i 'Brettspillmiserer' og opplever hvor tøft det er å dele rom med 'Pottesure papegøyer'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XLVIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' finner Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood ut hvilken terrengbåt de helst velger i 'Landjakk', ser på alle måtene barn kan sette seg fast i 'Smårollingfeller' og avslutter med distre folk som er 'Uten romforståelse'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XLIX
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Lolo Wood i gang kjøretøyene sine i 'Flyktende motorer', vender det andre kinnet til i 'Overraskelseskyss' og hogger i vei med litt 'Økseanarki'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood L
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' blir Rob, Steelo og deres spesielle gjest Lolo Wood, redd for å få sprøyter i 'Stikkpanikk', får igjen verbalt i 'Ta igjen-attakk' og føler hele dekkmønsteret når de blir 'Overkjørt'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' oppdager Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood at uhell elsker selskap i 'Du blir med meg', strever med vekter i 'Verstinger med vekstang' og møter noen fryktelig glade papper i 'Overentusiastiske fedre'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' smasher Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood handlevogner med 'Vognkrasjere', deler luftyogaens felles smerte med 'Dinglende duoer' og blir banket opp av gårdsdyr i 'Buskapssmell'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' faller Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood lett i 'Henfallen til fall', forbauser aper voldsomt med 'Apemagi' og har problemer med å finne tingene sine i 'Borte, men funnet'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LIV
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' kan ikke Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Lolo Wood løpe fra den morsomme snublingen i 'Fluktfall', viser fram imponerende bisker i 'Hermehunder' og snakker varmt for bruken av solide hodeplagg i 'Skudd fra oven'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LV
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' finner Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood ut hvor stor skade en strippepåle kan forårsake i «Pål-lateral skade', oppdager at ikke alle liker å bli skremt i 'Skremtraseri' før de avslutter med noen 'Forlatte farer'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LVI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' slår Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood ut fra tee i 'Sving-ding', krasjer med 'Små landingsmatter' og blir offer for noen 'Byfeller'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood besøk av sangeren Teddy Swims og ser nærmere på folk som 'Mister kontrollen', får faderlige råd i 'Pappavisdom og kaster ut noen problemtyper i 'Vis dem veien ut'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LVII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood problemer med å sette seg på grunn av 'Stolnasking', møter brått uventede dyr i 'Dyrestøkk' og bruker god tid på å falle i 'Gradvise fall'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LVIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob, Steelo og gjestevert Lolo Wood nærbilkontakt med leppene i 'Bilkyssere', får seg et slag under beltestedet med 'Lavtslåtte damer' og orker ikke å spise når de er sammen med 'Matlystslukkere'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LIX
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' oppdager Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood at telefoner kan være distraherende i 'Telefonblind', møter unger som bør finne seg en annen sportsgren i 'Minigolfere' og besøker noen steder der det er 'Kjempekaldt'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' går Rob, Steelo og gjestevert Lolo Wood smertefullt på hodet i 'Stup hvor som helst', kaster seg på sykkelen i 'Pedaltrøkk rett i pølen' og blir vitner til tupékatastrofer i 'Tupé på vift'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' ser Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood hva som skjer når du ikke lander støtt i 'Ustø landing', sjekker de mest lojale kjærestene i 'Jeg er opptatt' og avslutter med uheldige campere i 'Glamourløs camping'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' krasjer Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood med stil idet de 'Flyr over styret', spaserer på løs grunn i 'Fallgulv' og drar for å gjøre innkjøp altfor sent i 'Grubutikken'.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison hjelper statsadvokaten med å finne en nær venns savnede bror. Hun blir paranoid om antiterroragenter fra regjeringen.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison drømmer at broren hennes var involvert i et lokalt bankran. Mistankene hennes vokser når han uventet dukker opp i byen og blir involvert med en svindler.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison etterforsker tilsynelatende tilfeldige drap, og setter familien hennes i fare. Bridgette må holde en presentasjon om morens jobb for klassen.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Tre jenter blir funnet drept. Allisons syner kobler etterforsker Scanlon til saken.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison drømmer gjentatte ganger om en kvinne som blir overvåket av en fremmed mann på soverommet hennes.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison er opptatt med å etterforske dødsfallet til en lokal lege når en mann som hevder å være "Døden" begynner å dukke opp i synene hennes, noe som får henne til å frykte at hun snart skal dø.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison drømmer om livet hun kunne hatt hvis hun hadde blitt advokat, som hun opprinnelig ønsket å bli.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison har tilbakevendende drømmer om fortiden hennes, noe som forårsaker merkelige og sjokkerende endringer i hennes nåværende liv.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Devalos etterforsker dødsfallet til en av hans nære venner og får hjelp av Allison, som har hatt urovekkende drømmer om en ung kvinne som ser ut til å være besatt.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Tiden er viktig når en misfornøyd arbeider som ikke har noe å tape, tar Joe og tre andre som gisler.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Devalos' venns søster blir myrdet og Allison prøver å hjelpe til med å løse forbrytelsen. Drømmene hennes ser imidlertid ikke ut til å gi mening, ettersom de fortsetter å implisere vennens første ektemann, som døde for to år siden.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison drømmer om et spøkelse som var vitne til flere drap. I mellomtiden har Ariel en merkelig reaksjon på en oppgave i helsetimen.
programme.sub-title: Things to Do in Phoenix When You're Dead

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Mens hun jobber med en 17 år gammel forbrytelse, viser Allison uvanlig oppførsel som kan være avgjørende for å løse saken, men som samtidig setter familien hennes i fare.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison våkner under en motorvei uten å vite hvor hun er eller hvordan hun kom dit. Hennes mangel på hukommelse får henne til å begynne å tenke at hun kan ha drept noen med bilen sin.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison blir bedt av Devalos om å hjelpe noen av vennene hans med å finne deres savnede datter, men møter motstridende bevis på hvem som er ansvarlig for hennes forsvinning.
programme.sub-title: A Taste of Her Own Medicine

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Flere urovekkende drømmer om en forestående apokalypse får Allison til å ta drastiske tiltak som forberedelse til sivilisasjonens undergang.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison får nok en gang besøk av spøkelset til agent Cooper, som prøver å hjelpe henne med å finne ut hvem den virkelige morderen er i en forvirrende sak.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison har en drøm om et gameshow som kan avsløre løgner, og når hun våkner, hører hun en buzzer i hodet hver gang noen forteller henne en løgn.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison har mistanke om at en savnet kvinne kan være et offer for hennes merkelige barn. I mellomtiden dukker Joes søster Sarah opp uanmeldt.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison våkner fem år tilbake i tid etter at hun og Devalos blir skutt av en fremmed. Tidligere har Allisons drømmer fortalt henne at Devalos vil dømme en uskyldig mann for drap.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Dr. Mike matches medical skills with an elderly Chinese doctor and his 'grandson' to avert an epidemic.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Dr. Mike and Sully attempt to free cloud dancing from prison, as Teresa’s marriage to Jake is threatened by her aunt.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Dr. Mike must decide if a human birdman should be confined to a cage.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: U.S. Marshall Elias Burch asks law-student Matthew to defend him when he’s accused of murder.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Michaela and Sully reminisce about the ups and downs of their relationship and make a momentous decision about their future.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Robert E vents his frustration over the death of his son and the demise of his marriage by stepping into the ring with a traveling boxing champion.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Dr. Mike’s elation at Colleen’s acceptance to medical school quickly turns to disappointment when colleen chooses to marry Andrew instead.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Byron Sully, an enigmatic man whose closest companions are the Indians and a wolf, becomes Mike's friend as she struggles for acceptance.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Dr. Quinn immediately takes action to stop the spread of a deadly epidemic.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Mike's stoic, disapproving Bostonian mother, Elizabeth, who, after years of estrangement, visits her daughter in Colorado Springs but finds her unconventional life on the frontier difficult to accept.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: When a starving orphaned immigrant takes desperate measures to feed his siblings, the only thing standing between him and a noose is Kid Cole, the new sheriff.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Loren, the unforgiving father-in-law, threatens to take back Sully's homestead.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Michaela worries when Charlotte's husband, Ethan Cooper, comes back to the family he abandoned, convincing almost everyone of his newfound ways.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: When the town's water supply is tainted with mercury by a wealthy mining baron, many people become sick and Dr. Mike threatens the miner to clean it up or have his land taken away.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: When Doc Eli, a medicine-show man, arrives in town professing to have created the perfect bottled elixir, Mike sets out to call his bluff, especially when her children's health becomes jeopardized.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: A wandering cowboy abandons his baby boy and leaves him in Dr. Mike's care.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Progress comes to Colorado Springs, and Sully pays the price.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Hearing - Part 1
programme.desc: Kirby angriper Alexis og krever å vite hvorfor Joseph ville drepe henne. I rettsaken om foreldreretten til Danny, vitner Alexis mot Blake, som blir rasende.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Hearing - Part 2
programme.desc: Rettssaken om foreldreretten fortsetter, og Fallon vitner på vegne av broren sin, mens Sammy Jo fornærmer eksmannen. Fallon drar til Montana for å grave i Adams fortid. Alexis' leilighet blir endevendt.

programme.title: Dynasty: Tender Comrades
programme.desc: Steven og Claudia gifter seg, og dommeren henlegger saken om foreldreretten. Blake tilbyr Krystle en PR-jobb. Adam lurer Alexis til å signere blanke dokumenter.

programme.title: Dynasty: Tracy
programme.desc: Adam fabrikerer en falsk anklage om at Alexis sto bak forgiftningen, og Blake truer med å offentliggjøre historien. Mark angriper Krystle.

programme.title: Dynasty: Dex
programme.desc: Jeff anklager Alexis for å forsøke å drepe ham og tar tilbake aksjene sine. Mark blir bodyguard for Alexis. Dex Dexter, sønnen til et styremedlem, foreslår at han og Alexis danner en forretningsforbindelse.

programme.title: Dynasty: Peter De Vilbis
programme.desc: Dex fortsetter sin innsats for å vinne Alexis. Jeff får vite at Adam voldtok Kirby. Krystle stortrives i PR-jobben. Fallon møter en spennende millionær på veddeløpsbanen.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Proposal
programme.desc: Dex slår Alexis i kampen om en oljekontrakt. Jeff konfronterer Adam om Kirbys graviditet. Krystle sier ja til Blakes frieri. Del 1

programme.title: Dynasty: Carousel
programme.desc: Dex slår Alexis i kampen om en oljekontrakt. Jeff konfronterer Adam om Kirbys graviditet. Krystle sier ja til Blakes frieri. Del 2

programme.title: Dynasty: The Wedding
programme.desc: Adam frir til Kirby, som har til hensikt å skille seg fra Jeff. Tracy overtaler Krystle til å gi henne selskapets kredittkort og konfidensielle filer. Peter prøver seg på Claudia.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Ring
programme.desc: En fremmed hilser på lille Danny og vet hva han heter. Claudia blir bekymret og flytter familien til herskapshuset. Peter DeVilbis' arkitekt hinter om playboyens rusproblem. Kirbys hånd hovner opp.

programme.title: Dynasty: Lancelot
programme.desc: Kirbys helseproblemer fortsetter. Peter oppfordrer Fallon til å prøve kokain. Tracy saboterer Krystle på kontoret for å vinne Blake over på sin side. Veddeløpshesten Allegre blir stjålet.

programme.title: Dynasty: Seizure
programme.desc: Blake mottar et løsepengekrav for hesten. Peter kunngjør at han skal gifte seg med Fallon. Dex og Alexis blander forretninger med fonøyelser. Kirby får et anfall.

programme.title: Dynasty: A Little Girl
programme.desc: Blake blir mistenksom overfor Peter DeVilbis. Claudia mottar flere fioler fra «Lancelot». Adam forteller Blake sannheten om forgiftningen.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Accident
programme.desc: Allegre leveres tilbake og Blakes mistanker om Peters innblanding forsterkes. Tracy iscenesetter en pressekampanje for å ødelegge Krystle.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Vigil
programme.desc: Peter DeVilbis blir tatt da han forsøker å rømme landet, og blir arrestert for narkotikabesittelse og fengslet. Blake får tilbud om å jobbe i politikken. Fallon gjenvinner bevisstheten og finner ut at hun er lam.

programme.title: Dynasty: Steps
programme.desc: Alexis prøver å bestikke Kirby for å hindre henne i å gifte seg med Adam. Claudia mottar en ny pakke fra sin avdøde ektemann. Fallon kan fortsatt ikke gå, før barnets liv er i fare.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Voice - Part 1
programme.desc: Krystle finner ut at hun er gravid. Fallon lider av smertefull hodepine. Claudia og Steven besøker Matthews ulykkessted i Peru.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Voice - Part 2
programme.desc: Alexis planlegger å forpurre Blakes forretningsavtale med Rashid Ahmed. Tracy prøver å forføre Blake og får sparken. Steven blir mistenksom overfor Dex, som foretar en mystisk oppringning til Claudia.

programme.title: Nyfiken På
programme.desc: Här åker Rickard Olsson ned med Springtime Travel för att testa på en av deras träningssresor.

programme.title: Nyfiken På
programme.desc: Här besöker Rickard Olsson, Almunécar. Han tar sig ut på kulturhistoriska platser såväl som världsberömda vingårdar eller träningsresor över hela världen. Missa inte den enda unika och skräddarsydda reseprogrammet för dig som är 55-plus.

programme.title: Nyfiken På
programme.desc: Denna gången är det dags för att ta sig ned till Schweiz för att prova på att åka med den berömda Glaciärexpressen.

programme.title: Nyfiken På
programme.desc: Rickard tar sig ned till Polen för en rundresa till Krakow och Warzawa

programme.title: Nyfiken På
programme.desc: Rickard tar sig med på en Whiskeyresa och tågresa till Skottland

programme.title: Nyfiken På
programme.desc: Rickard reser till storstaden London för att se vad den har att erbjuda. Följ med honom när han utforskar julmarknader, åker skridskor och besöker världsberömda platser.

programme.title: Nyfiken På
programme.desc: Följ med Rickard på en resa till Rostock för den perfekta julekänslan.

programme.title: Nyfiken På
programme.desc: Følg med oss på resa til Afrika.

programme.title: Nyfiken På
programme.desc: Denna gången befinner vi oss i Kroatien tillsammans med More Sailing som arrangerar seglingsresor över hela världen.

programme.title: Nyfiken På
programme.desc: Programmet leds av en av Sveriges allra mest rutinerade teveprofiler, Rickard Olsson. Han tar sig till platser, städer och områden som han är nyfiken på. Missa inte den enda unika och skräddarsydda reseprogrammet för dig som är 55-plus.

programme.title: Nyfiken På
programme.desc: Det är dags för ett nytt avsnitt av reseprogrammet "Nyfiken På" med Rickard Olsson på afterworktv.se Denna gången åker vi till Italien för att följa med Rolf Flyg och Buss på en vinresa

programme.title: Nyfiken På
programme.desc: Vi besöker Gardasjön i Italien och får en fantastisk cykeltur.

programme.title: Nyfiken På
programme.desc: Denna gången är Rickard Olsson i Berlin tillsammans med Scandorama och deras gruppresa. Tillsammans med gruppen åker han på dagsutflykter till historiska platser men får även uppleva det nya Berlins mest populära och trendiga områden.

programme.title: Nyfiken På
programme.desc: Här ger Rickard Olsson tips om saker du inte får missa när du er på Åland.

programme.title: Nyfiken På
programme.desc: Denna gången är det dags för Rickard Olsson att ta sig till Normandie för att besöka de historiska platserna från Andra Världskriget.

programme.desc: Här åker Rickard Olsson ned med Springtime Travel för att testa på en av deras träningssresor.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series

programme.title: House of Lies

programme.title: House of Lies
programme.desc: Jeannie is placed in charge of a consulting gig when the racist CEO of a no-frills motel chain in Utah won't take Marty seriously; Clyde tries to make inroads with a virginal Mormon woman; Monica and Roscoe's parent-son bonding takes a dark turn.

programme.desc: Marty goes to war with his son's school when Roscoe is accused of sexual harassment for trying to kiss a boy and deals with the reappearance of April the stripper; Jeannie starts to get cold feet at the prospect of her upcoming wedding.

programme.desc: In the Season 1 finale, Marty and the Pod fight to pull off an eleventh-hour reprieve and stop the MetroCapital acquisition from happening; Jeannie makes a decision about marrying Wes; Marty's son Roscoe makes a life-altering choice of his own.

programme.title: Anger Management: Charlie and Kent Battle over a Patient
programme.desc: A long-standing rivalry over who's a better therapist leads to war when Kate steals Patrick, one of Charlie's group patients.
programme.sub-title: Charlie and Kent Battle over a Patient

programme.desc: Charlie challenges his group to do 36 hours of sleep deprivation therapy so that their \\"inhibitions come down and the truth comes out\\" - except the result turns out to be the exact opposite.

programme.title: Anger Management: Charlie's Patient Gets Out of Jail

programme.sub-title: Charlie's Patient Gets Out of Jail

programme.title: Anger Management: Charlie Dates Kate's Patient
programme.desc: Inflamed by Kate's comment that he's only \\"nouveau smart\\", Charlie starts covertly dating a brilliant coffee-shop barista.

programme.desc: Charlie falls for Jen's hot new business partner, Lori - played by Charlie's real-life ex, Denise Richards - only to find she thinks therapy is a scam.
programme.sub-title: Charlie Tries to Prove Therapy is Legit

programme.desc: Charlie gets an unexpected visit from his hyper-critical, bullying father – played by Charlie's real-life dad, Martin Sheen.

programme.desc: Charlie begins a questionable romantic relationship with an ex-patient.

programme.desc: Charlie's dad falls in with a bad crowd.

programme.desc: Jennifer moves in with Charlie temporarily and Kate gets jealous.

programme.desc: Charlie tries to help his patient, Ed (Barry Corbin), with a placebo pill that's supposedly reduces anger.

programme.desc: Charlie dates his daughter, Sam's, teacher.

programme.desc: Charlie and his dad (Martin Sheen) get into it when Martin has Charlie's daughter, Sam, baptized behind Charlie's back.

programme.desc: Charlie makes an unpleasant discovery about Jennifer's business partner

programme.desc: When Lindsay Lohan comes to Charlie for therapy, they begin a tumultuous relationship.

programme.desc: Charlie takes the group on an equine therapy trip.

programme.desc: Charlie enters an inappropriate relationship. Meanwhile, Nolan and Patrick fight over a woman

programme.desc: Charlie gets interesting news from Kate. Later, Charlie's house is used for an adult film shoot.

programme.desc: Charlie meets with an unorthodox therapist. Later, Patrick tricks Ed into thinking he won the lottery.

programme.title: Bull
programme.desc: The DA hires Bull to help convict an infamous drug dealer who murdered a police officer but avoided jail by feigning schizophrenia.

programme.title: Bull
programme.desc: Bull seizes the opportunity to make amends for losing a case that sent an innocent man to prison; Danny is reluctant to work with Cable's replacement.

programme.title: Bull
programme.desc: Bull agrees to help Chunk's daughter when her journalism professor faces jail time for stealing proprietary information from a dating app developer.

programme.title: Bull
programme.desc: Bull helps a doctor who illegally purchased a marijuana-derived oil to treat her patients; the case gets complicated when she is arrested for having intent to distribute.

programme.title: Bull
programme.desc: Bull helps a man who changed his identity after unwittingly assisting in a robbery; Bull must convince the jury that the man has redeemed himself by living an upstanding life for years.

programme.title: Bull
programme.desc: A friend from Bull's past enlists his services to help convince a jury that a domestic abuse survivor who shot her husband in his sleep is not guilty of murder

programme.title: Bull
programme.desc: Bull's team takes on a seemingly unwinnable case; a mute man faces the death penalty if he's found guilty of murder and arson; Bull is stunned to learn that his ex-wife is remarrying.

programme.title: Bull
programme.desc: Bull's team is rocked when a client is found guilty of murder; the team finds new evidence but must find a way to present it in court without being found in contempt.

programme.title: Bull
programme.desc: Bull returns to work with a new rich client for the firm to represent: an insurance company being sued by a dying mother for denying coverage of her liver transplant.

programme.title: Bull
programme.desc: Dr. Jason Bull and the team of experts at his trial consulting firm employ psychology to help their clients win.

programme.title: Bull
programme.desc: When the team consults for the NYPD on the defense of a police officer accused of excessive force in the shooting of an unarmed man, the social politics surrounding the case create tension within their own ranks.

programme.title: Bull
programme.desc: Business becomes personal for Bull when TAC assists with a civil suit against the bank that funded the terrorists responsible for Cable's death; Marissa enlists her former homeland security co-worker Taylor Rentzel to help with the suit.

programme.title: Bull
programme.desc: Bull joins the defense team of a seemingly unwinnable case when a doctor is put on trial after his DNA links him to a homicide; Bull and Benny work on selecting jurors who are predisposed to trust their instincts instead of incontrovertible evidence.

programme.title: Bull
programme.desc: Bull and the TAC team must help when Marissa's restaurateur husband is charged with involuntary manslaughter after one of his employees dies, allegedly because of negligence; Bull and Benny aim to select jurors who will believe it was an accident.

programme.title: Bull
programme.desc: Bull confronts his guilt over closing his psychiatric practice when a former patient goes on trial for killing her brother

programme.title: Bull
programme.desc: Bull takes on a pro bono client who was poorly advised by his public defender to plead guilty to a misdemeanor assault charge and is now facing felony manslaughter after the victim dies.

programme.title: Bull
programme.desc: Danny looks to her colleagues for help when her boyfriend is arrested and threatened with deportation; Bull represents a German national who is being sued by a museum over possession of a valuable painting.

programme.title: Bull
programme.desc: Bull represents a priest who knows, but cannot reveal, the identity of a driver involved in a fatal hit-and-run accident.

programme.title: Bull
programme.desc: Bull and his romantic rival, Diana Lindsay, join forces to create two defense teams when Diana's niece and her husband are charged with armed robbery;

programme.desc: As a first-time high school student, Chris is really looking forward to attending a school with some diversity.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris
programme.desc: Chris agrees to help a classmate, Angel improve his grades if Angel will help him get the attention of Chris' latest crush, Maria. Rochelle reluctantly befriends an ex-con, Peaches who has moved back into the neighborhood, but her good deed backfires.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris
programme.desc: Chris is on cloud nine when a cute girl, Jenise Huckstable, invites him to the Tattaglia Homecoming Dance. However, his nerves take a turn for the worse when her father, Dr. Huxtable, wants Chris to come over to the house to meet him before the dance.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris
programme.desc: When Julius and Rochelle decide to raise Mr. Omar's rent, Mr. Omar demands they bring the apartment up to code and moves in with Chris' family until the repairs are done.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris
programme.desc: Chris realizes that by helping the school's star running back and his friends with homework he is allowed to hang out with the cool kids. Greg tries to make him see that it's a bad idea.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris
programme.desc: When Doc's obnoxious new girlfriend, Stacy, makes Chris' life a living hell, Chris decides it's about time he split up the happy couple. Meanwhile, Tonya starts wearing a bra to get the attention of the boys in her class.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris
programme.desc: Although he is supposed to be home watching Drew and Tonya, Chris sneaks out to go to the movies with his friends and witnesses a shoot-out outside the theater.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris
programme.desc: Chris is just starting to fit in at his new high school when he gets asked on a date by the dorkiest girl in school, Kelly, whom everyone calls 'Big Bird.'

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris
programme.desc: Julius realizes that the key to keeping Rochelle happy in their marriage is getting advice from 'The Oprah Winfrey Show.' Unfortunately, the plan backfires when Rochelle equates Julius' new attitude with an extramarital affair.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris
programme.desc: When Rochelle orders a copy of her birth certificate, she realizes that she is actually one year younger than she thought she was and decides to start living her life with a new, younger attitude.

programme.desc: Chris is determined to spend New Year's Eve in Times Square, but Rochelle says Chris can only go if he finds a responsible adult to accompany him. The only problem is that the only people Chris can find to be his chaperone are two ex-convicts.

programme.desc: Chris and Greg decide to join the wrestling team to land a varsity jacket to impress the ladies.

programme.desc: Chris and Greg realize they'd better find fake IDs or they won't be able to go to the '18 and over' Fat Boys concert. Rochelle plans a surprise party for Julius.
